## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences on what changes and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New question(s)
- [ ] Fix to an existing question (wrong answer / misleading explanation)
- [ ] Bug fix in the CLI or TUI
- [ ] New feature / command
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / tooling

## If this PR touches questions

- [ ] Each new or edited question has exactly one `correct: true`
- [ ] Labels are contiguous lowercase (`a,b,c,d` or `a,b,c,d,e`)
- [ ] The file lives under `data/questions/<declared-domain>/`
- [ ] I have added or updated a `references` URL where the topic has canonical docs
- [ ] `pytest -q` passes locally
